name: Butterscotch Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butterscotch morsels in a heatproof bowl set over a pan of simmering water, stirring until smooth.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the salted peanuts and chow mein noodles.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
4. Allow to cool completely.
Yield: 24 drops
